consent.title: Cookies
consent.body: We use Google Analytics to understand how the site is used. No marketing cookies are set. You may accept or decline.

hero.eyebrow: The simplest way to collect wedding photos
hero.description: Your guests take photos, you enjoy them. No WhatsApp groups, no lost photos, all in one place.
hero.mockupAlt: Screenshot of guest login screen on mobile device

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.description: Three simple steps to all your memories
howItWorks.step1Description: Register and create your event in 2 minutes
howItWorks.step2Description: Guests scan the code or open the link and upload photos
howItWorks.step3Description: All photos in one place, ready to download

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about AddMemories
faq.answer1: Create an event, share the link or QR code with guests, they upload photos directly from their phones. You download everything in one place.
faq.answer2: Yes! The Free plan includes up to {{freeImages}} photos per guest, {{freeGuests}} guests, and {{freeDays}} days of photo storage. Perfect for trying it out. Upgrade when you're ready.
faq.question3: How many photos can guests upload?
faq.answer3: It depends on your plan: Free {{freeImages}} per guest, Basic {{basicImages}} per guest, Premium {{premiumImages}} per guest.
faq.question4: Are the photos private and secure?
faq.answer4: Yes, only you and your registered guests have access to the photos. Each event has a unique private link.
faq.answer5: All plans store photos for {{storageDays}} days (Free, Basic {{basicPrice}}, Premium {{premiumPrice}}). You download everything as a ZIP during that window.
faq.question6: Can it be used for events other than weddings?
faq.answer6: Absolutely! AddMemories is perfect for christenings, birthdays, team building, and any event where you want to collect photos.
faq.question7: Do guests need to install an app?
faq.answer7: No, everything works directly in the web browser. Guests just open the link or scan the QR code — no installation needed.
faq.question8: Can I upgrade my plan after creating an event?
faq.answer8: Yes, you can upgrade your plan at any time. Your existing photos and data are preserved.

about.title: About
about.hookLine: Keep your wedding memories alive through photos and messages from your loved ones.
about.whatIsBody: AddMemories is a modern web app that lets wedding guests share photos and well-wishes with the newlyweds, with no complicated logins or social-media uploads.
about.step1: Guests sign in with their name and email — no password, no app install.
about.step2: After signing in, they get a personal panel to upload photos and leave a message for the couple.
about.step3: The newlyweds later browse every photo and message, grouped by guest.

footer.description: The simplest way to collect wedding photos.

common.title: If you have any questions or suggestions, please let us know.
common.subtitle: Your feedback is important to us. We read and use all comments and suggestions to improve the application.

whyUs.title: Why AddMemories?
whyUs.benefit1Description: Only the couple can view all photos
whyUs.benefit2Description: Guests upload straight from the browser — no install, no account.
whyUs.benefit3Description: Every photo safely stored in the cloud — download whenever you like.
